description: navigate a browser session to a URL (load a page; first step of any flow)
rules: read-only — loads a page, does not mutate any remote service
runs `playwright-cli open <PW_URL>` via the bundled npx wrapper
degrades gracefully: records when npx/playwright-cli/browser are unreachable
usage: Set PW_URL (the page to load). Optional PW_SESSION isolates the browser session. Output: open.json.
limitation: Needs npx + @playwright/cli + a launchable browser to truly navigate; offline it records the unreachable state and still emits valid output.
